chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1827 of 2020 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.9033/2020 2. For hearing of main case 23.04.2025 Mr. Muzamil Hussain, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General Sardar Zafar Hussain, advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent which is taken on record. Learned counsel for respondent submits under instructions that the impugned notice / demand is being withdrawn forthwith, subject to the right of the department to initiate any proceedings as may be permissible under the law. In view of such representation, learned counsel for the petitioner states that the petition has served its purpose, hence, may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
